verses.text: A Levite goes to fetch his concubine from Bethlehem. The journey. He seeks to bring her home.
A Levite goes to fetch his concubine from Bethlehem. The journey. He seeks to bring her home.
A Levite goes to fetch his concubine from Bethlehem. The journey. He seeks to bring her home.
Her father detains him with hospitality. Delayed. They feast together.
Her father detains him with hospitality. Delayed. They feast together.
Her father detains him with hospitality. Delayed. They feast together.
He urges him to stay yet again. Pressed. The leaving is put off.
He urges him to stay yet again. Pressed. The leaving is put off.
He urges him to stay yet again. Pressed. The leaving is put off.
At last they leave and pass by Jebus. Onward. They press toward home.
At last they leave and pass by Jebus. Onward. They press toward home.
At last they leave and pass by Jebus. Onward. They press toward home.
They reach Gibeah but find no lodging. No welcome. The city is cold.
They reach Gibeah but find no lodging. No welcome. The city is cold.
They reach Gibeah but find no lodging. No welcome. The city is cold.
An old man asks where they go. The stranger. One man takes notice.
An old man asks where they go. The stranger. One man takes notice.
An old man asks where they go. The stranger. One man takes notice.
He takes them into his house. Mercy. Kindness is shown at last.
He takes them into his house. Mercy. Kindness is shown at last.
He takes them into his house. Mercy. Kindness is shown at last.
Wicked men of the city demand the guest. Wickedness. Sodom's sin in Israel.
Wicked men of the city demand the guest. Wickedness. Sodom's sin in Israel.
Wicked men of the city demand the guest. Wickedness. Sodom's sin in Israel.
They abuse the concubine till she dies. Abused. A horror is done.
They abuse the concubine till she dies. Abused. A horror is done.
The Levite finds her dead at the door. Dead. He takes her up.
The Levite finds her dead at the door. Dead. He takes her up.
He cuts her in pieces and sends them through Israel. Roused. The nation is stirred to act.
He cuts her in pieces and sends them through Israel. Roused. The nation is stirred to act.
